title: apocynum androsaemifolium subsp. pumilum
intro: Apocynum androsaemifolium subsp. pumilum, also known as the small dogbane, is a subspecies of the Apocynum androsaemifolium plant, native to North America. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat conditions like eczema, wounds, and other skin issues.
